title: Kansas
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in Kansas

The Kansas Consumer Assistance Program is run by the Kansas Insurance Department, Consumer Assistance Division. Staff can answer questions about health insurance regulations, rights, and responsibilities. They can help you file a complaint or appeal a health plan decision. Get consumer help with a problem or question.

Medicaid in Kansas

You can apply for Medicaid in Kansas by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

Shop Health Insurance Marketplace® in Kansas

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in Kansas

Health Insurance Marketplace® in Kansas

CHIP in Kansas

KanCare covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for KanCare right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about KanCare in Kansas.
